title: Ensure games appear as playable thumbnails on Home screen and launch immediately

requirements.text: Ensure the backend game catalog is automatically seeded so that the predefined playable games exist and are returned by `getAllGames()`, making them appear on the Home page as selectable thumbnail cards.

quotes: the games does not appear on the home screen as options to be played.

acceptanceCriteria: On a fresh install with no manually created games, calling `getAllGames()` returns at least the predefined games needed by the app.
The predefined games include stable IDs that match the frontend routing and launch logic (e.g., `match-word-to-image` and `choose-correct-image`).
After an upgrade, the predefined games still exist (or are re-seeded if missing) and appear on the Home page without any manual setup.

requirements.text: Update the frontend Home page experience so the playable games always appear as thumbnail cards and selecting a card navigates to `/games/$gameId` to start the game immediately.

quotes: the games does not appear on the home screen as options to be played.

acceptanceCriteria: The Home page renders a grid of game thumbnail cards when games are available.
Clicking/tapping a game card navigates to `/games/$gameId` for that game.
For the seeded predefined games, navigating from the Home page successfully loads the Game Launch page (i.e., does not show 'Game not found' due to missing backend game entries).

constraints: Backend must remain a single-actor Motoko canister; keep all Motoko logic in `backend/main.mo`.
Do not edit any files under `frontend/src/components/ui` (Shadcn components are read-only).
Do not edit immutable frontend hook paths: `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts`, `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx`, `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts`, `frontend/src/main.tsx`.
All user-facing text must be in English.
nonGoals: Implementing new game types beyond making existing predefined games appear on the Home page.
Adding third-party authentication providers (only Internet Identity is supported).
